ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seismic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic event */,
  "rup_mag" REAL /* Magnitude of the earthquake */,
  "rup_rake" REAL /* Rake angle of the fault plane */,
  "rup_hypo_depth" REAL /* Hypocenter depth of the earthquake */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the event was recorded */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of seismic event (e.g., inter-event, intra-event) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the seismic event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the seismic event */,
  "rupture_type" TEXT /* Type of rupture (e.g., strike-slip, dip-slip) */,
  "epicenter_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the epicenter */,
  "epicenter_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the epicenter */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the earthquake */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for dataset versioning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_events_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "site_vs30" REAL /* Shear-wave velocity at 30 meters depth (Vs30) */,
  "geological_description" TEXT /* Geological description of the site */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the site is located */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the site (e.g., clay, sand) */,
  "bedrock_depth" REAL /* Depth to the bedrock */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for dataset versioning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., inter-event, intra-event) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type (e.g., natural, induced) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for dataset versioning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ground_motion_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground motion result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "dist_rrup" REAL /* Rupture distance (Rrup) from the site to the fault */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., inter-event, intra-event) */,
  "mmi" REAL /* Modified Mercalli Intensity (MMI) of the ground motion */,
  "pga" REAL /* Peak ground acceleration */,
  "pgv" REAL /* Peak ground velocity */,
  "sa_0_3" REAL /* Spectral acceleration at 0.3 seconds */,
  "sa_1_0" REAL /* Spectral acceleration at 1.0 second */,
  "sa_3_0" REAL /* Spectral acceleration at 3.0 seconds */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for dataset versioning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ground_motion_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground motion model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model (e.g., linear regression, machine learning) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for dataset versioning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ground motion model */,
  "predicted_mmi" REAL /* Predicted Modified Mercalli Intensity (MMI) from the model */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the predicted MMI */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the model used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
